description: Two fragments of a legal document. In Hebrew. Mentions the date 1301 Seleucid = 989/990 CE. However the document itself is probably dated [474]9 AM = 988/89 CE (this appears five lines from the bottom). Mentions a certain David and probably other names; also mentions 'among the group of the artisans (האומנים). Needs further examination.
description_he: שני קטעים של מסמך משפטי; בעברית; מזכיר תאריך 1301 לשטרות = 989/990 לספירה; מזכיר דוד ו'מקבוצת האומנים'
